creator: chris@securityforensics.co.uk
text:
On Sun, Mar 30, 2008 at 10:40:07PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/afflib,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/122274 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/122274
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

I am the port maintainer and I approve of the changes.

Chris
